[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010011000 3
1 001001101 4
2 101011000 4
3 000110101 4
4 100001010 3
5 100100011 4
6 110101101 6
7 110111111 8

01 111111111 a
